---
title: "Emma Frances Scroggs"
---

## Emma Frances Scroggs

**Dates:** (1823.4-1876)

**Maiden name:** (Stephens)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Sydney Scroggs, curate of Pitt, Hursley, and subsequently of Kingsteignton

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
